# Let's read the file at the given path and inspect content.
path = "/mnt/data/file-HGyd9XXhUmdkEJc57jFxmY-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()

text[:1000], len(text)

s1 = "وَمَا كُنتُمْ تُخْفُونَ أَن يُبْدى لِلرَّسولِ مِنْ أَصَابَ بَعْضُكُمْ مِنْكُمْ أَوْ أَنتُمْ أَصَحُّ لَهُ بِهِ"
s2 = "لَمْ يَكُنْ لِعِيسَى عِلْمٌ بِغَيْبِ اللَهِ إِلّا مَا أُوحِيَ إِلَيْهِ"
s3 = "لَمْ يَكُنْ لِسيدنا مُحَمَدٍ عِلْمٌ بِغَيْبِ اللَهِ إِلّا مَا أُوحِيَ إِلَيْهِ"
s4 = "وَمَا يَنْظُرُونَ إِلّا صَيْحَةً وَاحِدَةً تَأْخُذُهُمْ وَهُمْ يَزِحُونَ"
s5 = "لا عِلْمَ لِأَحَدٍ بِغَيْبِ اللَهِ إِلّا مَا أُوحِيَ إِلَيْهِ"

print(text.find(s1))
print(text.find(s2))
print(text.find(s3))
print(text.find(s4))
print(text.find(s5))

# Find all occurrences of s1-s5 in the text
def all_indices(text, sub):
    indices = []
    i = text.find(sub)
    while i != -1:
        indices.append(i)
        i = text.find(sub, i+1)
    return indices

indices_s1 = all_indices(text, s1)
indices_s2 = all_indices(text, s2)
indices_s3 = all_indices(text, s3)
indices_s4 = all_indices(text, s4)
indices_s5 = all_indices(text, s5)
indices_s1, indices_s2, indices_s3, indices_s4, indices_s5, len(text)

import json

spans_final = [
    {"span_start": 179, "span_end": 288, "span_text": s1, "citation_type": "Aya"},
    {"span_start": 393, "span_end": 502, "span_text": s1, "citation_type": "Aya"},
    {"span_start": 516, "span_end": 586, "span_text": s2, "citation_type": "Hadith"},
    {"span_start": 690, "span_end": 768, "span_text": s3, "citation_type": "Hadith"},
    {"span_start": 881, "span_end": 953, "span_text": s4, "citation_type": "Aya"},
    {"span_start": 1057, "span_end": 1118, "span_text": s5, "citation_type": "Hadith"}
]

print(json.dumps({"citations": spans_final}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
